mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ds_refund ( refund_no, order_no, amount, reason, status, refund_policy, request_source, applicant_id, third_party_refund_no, channel_status, audit_user, audit_time, audit_remark, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{refundNo}, #{orderNo}, #{amount}, #{reason}, #{status}, #{refundPolicy}, #{requestSource}, #{applicantId}, #{thirdPartyRefundNo}, #{channelStatus}, #{auditUser}, #{auditTime}, #{auditRemark}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE ds_refund SET status = #{status}, refund_policy = #{refundPolicy}, request_source = #{requestSource}, applicant_id = #{applicantId}, third_party_refund_no = #{thirdPartyRefundNo}, channel_status = #{channelStatus}, audit_user = #{auditUser}, audit_time = #{auditTime}, audit_remark = #{auditRemark}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ds_refund WHERE order_no = #{orderNo} ORDER BY create_time DESC, id DESC
SELECT * FROM ds_refund WHERE order_no = #{orderNo} AND status = 'PENDING' ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) FROM ds_refund WHERE order_no = #{orderNo} AND status = 'SUCCESS'
